input.hiring_signal: Selective engineering hiring remains open; Public restructuring signal observed in the last 120 days; Developer tools and infrastructure-heavy stack

candidate_output.subject: Retool – quick observation
candidate_output.body:
Hi,

I noticed Retool appears to be hiring actively.

Working angle: Segment 2 - Restructuring / Layoffs. Public AI readiness appears to be 0/3.

Compared with peers in the same space, it looks like there may be a gap around AI-assisted developer tooling.

Would a 30-minute conversation next week be useful?

Best,
Tenacious
